name: Cookie Crust
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter or margarine (cold, in pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Spray a 15x10x1 inch pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the flour, butter (in cold, piece form), sugar, and salt until the mixture forms fine crumbs.
4. Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 20 to 23 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Top with filling.
